warnings.argon2MemoryBelowRecommended: Argon2 memory cost is below 64 MiB
warnings.legacyFastSha: Fast SHA digests are legacy-only for password storage
warnings.preferSlowKdf: Prefer Argon2id (or PBKDF2-SHA256 with high iterations for compatibility)

errors.invalidSaltLength: Password hash salt length is outside NullID's supported range
errors.invalidPbkdf2Iterations: PBKDF2 iteration count is outside NullID's supported range
errors.invalidArgon2Params: Argon2id cost parameters are outside NullID's supported range
errors.argon2Unavailable: Argon2id is not supported in this runtime
errors.argon2UnavailableVerify: Argon2id records cannot be verified in this runtime
